item.name: Adamantoise Whistle
item.description: A small polished whistle carved from thick turtle shell. Emits a low-pitched tone which summons an adamantoise mount to your side.

mount.name: Adamantoise
mount.action: Summon forth your adamantoise mount. He(?) is actually quite faster than he appears.
mount.description: Native to the Near Eastern island of Thavnair, adamantoises were long thought to be impossible to domesticate. However, through the efforts of both Ul'dahn naturalists and thaumaturges, a handful have been successfully trained not only to accept riders, but also wield ancient magicks which allow the colossal scalekin to fly.
mount.tooltip:
M-Me? Perfectly fine!
S-Solid as an adamantoise!
- Cocobezi
